changeSet.author: m3mpm
changeSet.sql: -- вспомогательная MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_checks, так как в разных tasks присутсвует -- одинаковый запрос к одним и тем же данным DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS mv_checks; CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_checks AS SELECT ch.id, ch.date, ch.peer, ch.task, CASE WHEN v.state = 'Failure' OR p2p.state = 'Failure' THEN 'Failure' ELSE 'Success' END AS state FROM checks ch JOIN p2p ON p2p.check_id = ch.id AND NOT p2p.state = 'Start' LEFT JOIN verter v ON v.check_id = ch.id AND NOT v.state = 'Start';

changeSet.author: m3mpm
m3mpm
changeSet.sql: -- триггер обновления VIEW mv_checks, если обновятся данные в p2p table CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER tg_refresh_mv_checks AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON p2p FOR EACH STATEMENT EXECUTE PROCEDURE tg_refresh_mv_checks();
